topic: Identifying factor pairs of a number
latex:
Identify the factor pairs of $30$.

a. $\square$ 1, 20 \quad g. $\square$ 2, 14 \quad m. $\square$ 3, 14 \quad s. $\square$ 4, 8

b. $\square$ 1, 28 \quad h. $\square$ 2, 15 \quad n. $\square$ 3, 18 \quad t. $\square$ 5, 6

c. $\square$ 1, 30 \quad i. $\square$ 2, 16 \quad o. $\square$ 3, 21 \quad u. $\square$ 5, 10

d. $\square$ 1, 32 \quad j. $\square$ 2, 21 \quad p. $\square$ 4, 5 \quad v. $\square$ 6, 7

e. $\square$ 1, 38 \quad k. $\square$ 3, 8 \quad q. $\square$ 4, 6 \quad w. $\square$ 6, 9

f. $\square$ 2, 10 \quad l. $\square$ 3, 10 \quad r. $\square$ 4, 7 \quad x. $\square$ 7, 9
